codeReview.summary: The C dispatch integration for INT8-compressed allreduce is well-implemented. The set_compressed_allreduce() API correctly invalidates and rebuilds the C dispatch plan. The c_dispatch.c routing logic properly prioritizes compressed mode and falls back to uncompressed when needed. Compressed buffer allocation uses correct size calculation (n + num_wgs*2 bytes per GPU). The compressed kernel library loading includes proper error handling. Minor documentation inconsistencies exist but do not affect correctness.

issues.description: Kernel header comment says 'Total: n + ceil(n/32)*2 bytes' but actual layout uses one scale per workgroup (16 columns), giving n + ceil(n/16)*2 bytes. For n=1280: comment suggests 1360 bytes but correct size is 1440 bytes. Python allocation is correct; only the comment is misleading.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed the pattern of checking library availability before enabling features (set_compressed_allreduce checks _gemv_fused_compressed_fn_ptr). This pattern matches existing set_kernel_p2p_allreduce and set_deferred_attention_ar implementations.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: tp_engine.py lines ~5740-5760: has_compressed_fn check before enabling, prints warning if library not loaded

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker deviated from skill procedure step 5 (Run Tests to Verify) due to command timeout constraints. Model loading + 100-step benchmark takes 10-15 minutes which exceeds available timeouts. The skill should note that full TP=4 validation may require running tests with fireAndForget=true or extended timeouts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows worker created bench_compressed_ar_tp4.py but could not run full validation. Skill SKILL.md does not mention timeout handling for long-running benchmarks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Compressed buffer size calculation: compressed_size = n_local + num_wgs*2 where n_local = hidden_size/tp_size and num_wgs = ceil(n_local/16). For TP=4 with hidden_size=5120: n_local=1280, num_wgs=80, compressed_size=1440 bytes/GPU. This is 56% of uncompressed FP16 buffer (2560 bytes).

correctnessDetails: Full TP=4 multi-GPU validation was not completed due to command timeout constraints (10-15 min runtime). Worker verified: (1) kernels compile successfully, (2) compressed kernel library loads, (3) API integration works, (4) C dispatch plan rebuilds correctly. Validation criteria VAL-CA-005 and VAL-CA-006 appear satisfied based on code review. VAL-CA-007 (throughput) and VAL-CA-008 (no regression) require running bench_compressed_ar_tp4.py on dev server with extended timeout.

issues_summary.description: Kernel header comment has misleading buffer size formula. Python allocation is correct (uses num_wgs = ceil(n/16), not ceil(n/32)). No functional impact.

validation_contract_status.VAL-CA-005: LIKELY_PASS - C dispatch integration with compressed allreduce flag is implemented. use_gemv_fused_compressed flag controls routing. dispatch_allreduce() prioritizes compressed path.
validation_contract_status.VAL-CA-006: LIKELY_PASS - tp_engine.py exposes set_compressed_allreduce(enabled) API. Mode correctly propagates through C dispatch plan.
validation_contract_status.VAL-CA-007: NOT_TESTED - TP4 throughput improvement requires running bench_compressed_ar_tp4.py. Implementation is complete.
validation_contract_status.VAL-CA-008: NOT_TESTED - Single-GPU regression check requires running benchmark. Code paths for compressed mode are isolated from single-GPU path.

summary: C dispatch integration for INT8-compressed allreduce is correctly implemented. The set_compressed_allreduce() API properly manages mode switching and C dispatch plan rebuilds. Compressed buffer allocation and C routing logic are correct. Full TP=4 validation (throughput and correctness) was not completed due to timeout constraints but the implementation is sound. Minor documentation issue in kernel header comment is non-blocking.
